text:
Learning Disabilities and other Developmental Delays - Medicare Only Claims 0 - Claims and FFS not met
1 - Claims met, not FFS
2 - Claims not met, FFS
3 - Claims met and FFS
 LEADIS_COMBINED_EVER Learning Disabilities and other Developmental Delays - Combined Medicare Medicaid Claims, First Ever Occurrence Date date - MM/DD/YYYY
 LEADIS_MEDICAID_EVER Learning Disabilities and other Developmental Delays - Medicaid Only Claims, First Ever Occurrence Date date - MM/DD/YYYY
 LEADIS_MEDICARE_EVER
